narrative:
Precinct Toledo 5G (precinct in Lucas County) has 930 registered voters, with 69.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 7.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.2%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 15.9 percentage points.
